audit.summary: New Farm Seafood has an existing website, and the strongest useful gap is: proof is not doing enough work.

findings.title: Proof is not doing enough work
findings.evidence: The captured text does not clearly surface reviews, project proof, warranty, licences, or gallery proof.
findings.fix: Add a proof section with real reviews, project examples, and verified guarantees/credentials.

findings.title: Title does not target the main local intent
findings.evidence: Captured title: "Home - New Farm Seafood". Inferred keyword: "restaurant Restaurant".
findings.fix: Rewrite title around "restaurant Restaurant" while keeping the business name.

findings.title: Meta description is missing
findings.fix: Write a specific 1-2 sentence snippet with service, location, and next action.

offerAngle: I noticed your site has a fixable trust gap: The captured text does not clearly surface reviews, project proof, warranty, licences, or gallery proof.

followUpDraft: Quick follow-up on New Farm Seafood: the main opportunity I noticed is Add a proof section with real reviews, project examples, and verified guarantees/credentials.. Worth me sending the short audit?
